name: Secret Sect Druid Wid
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>暗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>躍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のドルイド・ウィド
desc: If this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard: You can target 1 Continuous Spell Card in your Graveyard; Set that target. That Set card cannot be activated this turn. You can only use the effect of "Secret Sect Druid Wid" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard: You can target 1 Continuous Spell Card in your Graveyard; Set that target. That Set card cannot be activated this turn. You can only use the effect of "Secret Sect Druid Wid" once per turn.
eff: If this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard: You can target 1 Continuous Spell Card in your Graveyard; Set that target. That Set card cannot be activated this turn. You can only use the effect of "Secret Sect Druid Wid" once per turn.

mst: Prevents activation of your Spell Cards
